title: Water Order Exam
intendedTensionBeat: Both puppies are reachable, but water, blockers, and dock residue make the correct rescue order non-optional.
intendedReleaseBeat: A disciplined lower-first rescue followed by a dock-safe pivot proves the player understands the band.
expectedPath: Read the water-threatened target, clear its blocker route, stabilize dock during the pivot, then finish the safer target.
expectedFailMode: Generic clearing or wrong target order causes water loss or dock overflow before the first rescue is secured.
designNotes: Exam level: no new mechanic. The dominant failure should clearly be wrong rescue order under water pressure.
